reviews_data.review_text: Ordered pickup at 10:01am (10:20 eta) got to store at 10:16am, got my bowl at 10:52 am - crazy! And banana was beyond way too ripe.

I love the bowls here but the service is always bad in the mornings. Consistently late. In particular this morning I walked in and was not greeted at all, completely ignored as the one person behind the counter was making a bowl. Placed my pickup order 20+ minutes ago and they had not even started it. I’ve been in the store for 10minutes now so 30+ since the order was made and it’s still not being worked on. I’ve placed multiple DoorDash orders here where the driver will cancel the delivery after waiting at the store for 10s of minutes as well. Seems to be a consistent theme. Frustrating when you need to make it to work on time. Will not be ordering from here in the mornings anymore

reviews_data.owner_answer: Skye thank you so much for this review! We are sad that you missed out on some of our espresso drinks, the machine/water pressure in store have been temperamental lately and we are trying our best to get it dialed in! Already looking forward to the next time we can see you back in store :)
reviews_data.review_text: Visited on a whim and I’m glad I did! Unfortunately their espresso machine was down but Christopher suggested the drip coffee with a splash of milk and wow it’s my new favorite thing. The shop itself was very clean and workers were friendly and I absolutely felt taken care of. I will be back for a bowl!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Thank you Keith!
We appreciate your kinds words and truly strive to bring the surfer vibe to Charlotte! We appreciate you enjoying our product and thank you for being a part of Mamaka! :)
reviews_data.review_text: Best coffee I’ve ever had, and I’m quite a coffee snob. Super attentive and friendly staff as well, with a really chill “surfer vibe” atmosphere inside!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Kaitlin! We appreciate you being a loyal supporter and enjoying the Pipeline with us! Thank you for being patient with our wait times, we are working hard with each member of our team as we have a lot of new employees! We are so glad we were able to correct our mistakes and we look forward to seeing you again next week! :)
reviews_data.review_text: I order from this Mamaka probably once a week and I do agree that the wait times can be long because they cut everything to order and make it fresh so that’s why I like to order ahead of time on the app. I love the pipeline bowl and did have a small challenge with my food last time and the customer service I received from the manager was exactly as I would expect and they made everything right. Great food and great customer service I will continue to order weekly.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you London! We are so glad you enjoyed your experience and cant wait for you to be back through; we are grateful for your grace with our staff and some of the wait times, we have been working hard to improve each member of our team and have a lot of new employees who are working hard to make each product come out the best it can. Let us know what you love in your coffee and maybe we can get you pointed in an even better direction next time! Cheers :)
reviews_data.review_text: The bowls are truly made fresh and the ingredients are generous! I enjoyed the bowl more than the coffee, it did take awhile to get my order but the staff is truly working hard to make them just right, I’d definitely recommend trying mamaka next time you are in south end!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hey Owen!

Thank you for providing the feedback; we are always striving to improve and come up with creative ways to make our business better. We have on boarded a lot of new staff in recent weeks, and unfortunately dealt with a lot of spring break call outs and a wave of sickness running through the team. We were under staffed this past weekend, and are doing all that we can to get our team back up to full capacity.

We appreciate you enjoying our product, and want to strive to improve the wait time you experienced. If you could please reply directly to this review with contact information, DM us on Instagram or e-mail us hello@mamakabowls.com we would love to send you a gift card for your next couple visits on us!

Thank you!
reviews_data.review_text: Delicious but expect to wait 30+ mins every time.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the kind feedback Lindsey! we appreciate you being a loyal supporter and enjoying bowls with us! If you ever do want us to split your large bowl between 2 smaller containers or any other adjustments we are happy to try and accommodate where we can :)
reviews_data.review_text: Love love loooove mamaka! Some of my favorite açaí! My only feesback is the large bowls are deep and hard to mix everything together so you get a little bit of everything in each bite, but being nit picky. It’s super yummy and they have great bowl recipes.
The bean es el mejor bowl 😍
This place is the best coffee and smoothie place in the state! Soooo yummy and such awesome staff!
Employees are so kind and make the best açaí bowls ever!
Love this place so much. It never disappoints
Love a good bowl from Mamaka!   The bro is one of my favorites to always order! The gnarly coffee is always a bonus to get. Must try if in the Charlotte area!
Great vibes, great açaí!
Most delicious thing I’ve ever eaten had the peanut butter bowl

Met Blake at Mamakas in Houston TX. He invited us to visit Mamakas in Charlotte. We did and we were not disappointed. Great experience, great service. Neat shop. Enjoyed the experience. Will return soon!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the kind words Christine! Allergies are always taken seriously around here:) we appreciate you being a part of Mamaka!
reviews_data.review_text: They take allergies seriously and prep food in a different space!

Visiting NC, i wanted a smoothie bowl. I’m so glad I chose Mamaka Bowls! The atmosphere was great when I walked in. Everyone was very nice. The man who took my order was SO NICE. They made a slight mistake and he came out to the car to bring me the right drink and told me to keep the old one. My bowl and drinks were so refreshing and delicious. 10/10. so good.

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Bailyn!

Thank you for taking the time to reply; we absolutely hear you and want you to know, in full transparency this is something we are working diligently to rectify on our end. Unfortunately with winter holidays, and turnover with staff in between school semesters we frankly have been under staffed. We have brought on new leadership staff, and ensuring that our customer wait times are brought down is one of our top priorities.

Regardless of staffing, it is completely unacceptable for the cash register to ever be left unattended; even if we are having to run with only our manager, or 1-2 team members, there should always be someone stationed there to ensure guests are able to get their order in.

Thank you again for taking the time to provide us this feedback; we know that we have ground to gain in this area, and we will continue doing all we can in order to accomplish that end. We really appreciate you being a repeat customer at Mamaka and continuing to give us a chance.

If you could please DM us on Instagram @mamakabowls, reply directly to this comment, or email us at hello@mamakabowls.com we would love to send you a gift card for your next visit on us, and allow us to continue to grow.

Thank you!
reviews_data.review_text: I like this place but every time I come, the service is just so slow! I feel like there should be someone available to take orders at all times. There is never a time where there should be an empty cash register. There is absolutely zero urgency and it’s unfortunate because the product is quality. The vibes are just a little too chill. Like is anyone taking a job seriously…

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Stormy, we’re so sorry to hear about your experience trying to reach us. We weren’t aware there was an issue with our phone line, and we truly apologize for the frustration this caused. Our team is looking into this right now with customer support, as we are not receiving our calls. We’d still love the chance to connect with you, please reach out to us at blake@mamakabowls.com so we can assist you right away!

We also have online services (order.mamakabowls.com) as well as an app (mamaka) that gets your requests directly to us. We created these avenues to make things simpler and make sure you always get a response as quick as possible. Again, we apologize about our technical difficulties.
reviews_data.review_text:
EDIT*: I had placed a 1 star review, but the service and dedication to fix the issue has been quick. I also like their product despite inconsistencies, so I recommend going for both their coffees and bowls and reaching out if you have any issues!!

Another edit: the manager only offered to fix the situation if I’d come in and have a chat with him. Very uncomfortable.

I have been coming to this place for about 3 months now and I like the bowls. However I have a problem with the guy in the glasses. I had ordered a coffee and got the worst latte that I had ever tasted in my life. I had a conversation with him while waiting for my order and I felt very offended by the things he was saying to me. Nothing but rude and very uncomfortable. Do not recommend coming in for a coffee at all. Never coming here again after this experience.

Great service,  I placed an online order and got stuck in traffic so I called them and the manager told me not to worry. He said he would gauge it when I was a few minutes away so that it was fresh and that I was happy. Definitely made my day. The manager went above and beyond. Will be coming back for sure!

I've been coming to this place for more than a couple of months, the girls always provide excellent service, but today I ran into a guy with glasses who made a somewhat derogatory comment towards me. I don't know why this happens in 2025. This person ruined the whole good impression I had of the entire team in just 2 minutes.
Super delicious smoothie bowls and it’s a really cute place!
Great spot for acai bowls and smoothies! 10/10

This place has officially won my heart when it comes to smoothie and acai bowls! I have tried them from quite a few places and never had one that immediately made me go, OH Wow! The flavor was crafted to perfection 👌 plus like how some places do they'll leave an off putting aftertaste but not this place! I would've eaten it all in one sitting if I could and let's not mention the SIZE for the PRICE ❤️ Yall are out here doing God's work! Continued blessings on your business and may you continue reaching your target audience, I am definitely one of them 🫶🏼😌

5.0 more like 6.0 ! If you like fresh, this is the place. They have a handful of locations but that doesn’t stop them from being the best in town! Got the opportunity to work with them on some collaborations and the ladies were so much fun to hangout with. Can’t say enough good about this company. Go go go!
I thoroughly enjoyed my pumpkin bowl. There was no time to take a picture because it looked too good and it tasted as good as it looked. I’ll get a picture when I go back.
Smoothies are great but they played the most depressing music

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Andy! Thank you for taking the time to share this feedback with us; our goal is to always provide a great customer experience, and part of how we strive to accomplish that is our speed of service.

During our peak times lines can definitely get crazy, and we apologize that your wait was longer than anticipated. We do have an app for mobile orders, we offer online ordering and if you ever want to just call in, we will take your call ahead orders over the phone too!

As you experienced, everything we make is fresh to order. It is one of the things we pride ourselves on, no preservatives, no added sugars, what you see on our menu is exactly what you get. Our team is trained to keep a clean prep station, rotate their utensils, and cleanliness is something we stress heavily. However, when the bowls are lined up down the counter and we are trying to get as many bowls made as possible, they may have had some left over fruit pieces in between that they cleaned after the fact. We absolutely understand that sometimes that can increase wait times, but we’d love to have you back in store to give the product another chance, on us!

If you could comment below or DM our instagram, we’d love to send you a free bowl for next time. Thank you so much!
reviews_data.review_text:
20 mins to order plus 25 mins to get food is way too long for an açaí bowl, especially waiting inside a place with multiple blenders going on. Just horrible.

Staffs looked busy, but simply running like headless chickens. You prep your strawberries beforehand, not cutting on the spot and toss leftover on the floor. Having trash all over the line is simply a lack of training and experience.

Do not recommend.
Super fresh and tasty smoothies and fruit bowls. Love their coconut coffee too.

I want to keep coming to this place but the quality goes down hill each time I come. Bowl base to topping ratios are off. Needs more toppings, otherwise you end up eating a bowl of plain base for most of the bowl (even the smallest size). I appreciate their attention to allergy details. I feel like it’s because their staff is in a hurry to get bowls out, which I understand but hate that quality of all things is what is sacrificed. These bowls can be expensive so hoping they can improve their operations to maintain consistency.

The smoothie bowls here are SO good! The fruit blend is so smooth and creamy and the granola and other toppings were fresh and delicious. The breakfast tacos were disappointing so I would skip those next time, but the coffee was another item I’d get again. The shop is very cute, but the floors looked dirty and the stools they have at the tables were very rickety and uncomfortable. Overall, a good experience with the bowls, coffee, and staff!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hey Sophie! Thank you for your honest and thoughtful feedback. We’re genuinely sorry to hear about your recent experience — that’s not the level of service we strive to provide, and we completely understand your frustration.
We’ve gone ahead and refunded your order, and we deeply regret the delay and confusion with your order. While we’re proud of the quality of our bowls and coffee, experiences like yours show us where we need to grow. We’re actively reviewing our order flow and have already addressed this issue with our team to help prevent anything like it from happening again.

Customer care and consistency are top priorities for us, and we're committed to holding ourselves to a higher standard. We'd truly appreciate the opportunity to make this right — please feel free to send us a direct message or email to emma@mamakabowls.com so your next visit is on us! We'd love to welcome you back and ensure your next visit reflects the experience you should always have at Mamaka.

Thank you again for taking the time to share your experience.
reviews_data.review_text:
Great bowls and coffee, but disappointing service. I really enjoy Mamaka’s bowls and coffee. The quality of the food and drinks is consistently good. However, my experiences with the service have not matched that same standard.

Most times I’ve been in, the staff isn’t particularly friendly or accommodating, and the service can be quite slow. I understand that bowls and smoothies can be time consuming to make, especially when the shop is busy, but even during slower times, I’ve noticed a lack of urgency and customer care.

My most recent visit was especially frustrating. We went in about 15 minutes after opening. There were only two other customers who had already ordered. We got a drip coffee, a specialty latte, and one small bowl to share. The coffees came out quickly, but the bowl never arrived. After waiting 30 minutes, we finally went to check and it seems that our order had been lost.

From what I could tell, the ordering system involves writing orders directly on the cups and bowls, which means if someone forgets to do that step, the order simply vanishes. That’s exactly what happened. It seems our bowl was never written down, so it was never made. It took another 15 minutes after we asked for them to prepare it.

What was meant to be a quick stop turned into an hour-long wait, and there was no real apology or accountability from the staff. The lack of ownership over the mistake and the generally dismissive attitude made it clear that customer experience isn’t a priority.

I want to keep supporting Mamaka because their offerings are great, but I hope they seriously reevaluate how they treat their customers and consider implementing a more reliable ordering system.

UPDATE:
Since posting my original review, the team at Mamaka responded to make things right. I’ve since returned, and I’m happy to say the experience was much better. The staff were friendly, the service was quick, and my bowl was just as yummy as I remember. I very much appreciate that they took the time to address my concerns. It really shows they care about their customers and are willing to improve. I’m looking forward to my next visit!
The bowls are absolutely delicious. They also have many health add ons that can be added/customized to your bowl

What a fun place! I love the swing they have hanging in the doorway (when it’s nice out) the decor is beachy/summer/surfing. The bowls are some of the best outside of ones I have had in Hawaii! It’s such a nice treat to have on a walk, on a sunny day, or anytime you need a a fresh pick me up.

Beautiful atmosphere with bright colors and a super friendly vibe. The staff was welcoming, and the menu is simple and easy to follow. There’s plenty of comfortable seating, and they had the windows open, so fresh air and a nice breeze made it even better.

They even have a swing you can sit on — such a fun touch! I sat at one of the indoor tables and waited less than 4 minutes for my order. I got the Pipeline Smoothie, which was delicious. Next time, I’m definitely trying one of their bowls!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hey Alex! Thank you for taking the time to write this review, we are super sorry that you experienced a longer wait time in store today, and the team felt understaffed. Staffing on holiday weekends can be challenging and we are always working hard to balance that demand between guests, and our team.

We are working on this diligently right now as a corporate team to get more quality team members on board and be able to better balance the load. Along with the holiday weekend, we are in the middle of a big summer transition as much of our staff leaves/comes back for college.

If you would comment back to this reply, or DM us directly on Instagram, we would love to have you back in store with your next visit on us! Speed of Service and Attentive and Courteous Service are two of our operational pillars, and as we keep working to get Charlotte fully up to speed we are confident you can experience both during each visit.

Thank you!
reviews_data.review_text: The product is great. But the staff is overworked. They need more employees here. 30+ min wait time for a smoothie is laughable.
Great customer service and menu has a lot of options.
I always enjoy getting a Mamaka bowl made to order. The employees work as fast as they can to serve you and always kind.
Was road tripping and saw that this was in the vicinity.  I love this place in DFW !

I fell in love last year and I have stayed loyal since. I've been tempted by other smoothie places through door dash coupons, bogo deals and friends trying to set me up but ive never cheated. The staff here are always dancing and having fun. It's highly infectious until I see the reflection in the glare of the window and realize... I have no rhythm. The interior makes me feel like im a surfer in Hawaii. However, once I get out of the store i remind myself.... i almost drowned in a 3ft pool. I was stuck on the bro for a year but ive finally moved onto the bean in 2025. May take me 11 more years to try the rest of the menu.
Very good fresh smoothie bowls with a chill beach vibe.
so so delicious!! fresh (not frozen) fruit, creamy smoothie base, homemade granola, and well packaged!
love it! sooo good so hard to find a good place and this was delish amazing quality the place itself is stunning
Bro bowl :) add honey on top !

I was quite excited when I saw a Mamaka location in charlotte while looking for some breakfast. I’d only been to the original location in Fayetteville AR which is GREAT. I was highly disappointed with this one, I went at 9am and was told they are out of the breakfast taco on the menu. I felt rushed to order and the vibes were just not the same as the other location. Possibly understaffed which could explain the rude check out girl she may have just been stressed or new but never the less I was very disappointed due to expecting it to be like the Fayetteville location.
This is the cutest little spot with the best bowls and coffee!! I love the Bean bowl and the iced gnarley 😋😋
Super friendly staff, amazing atmosphere and most importantly delicious smoothie bowls! Super fast and attentive workers! Will definitely be back!

I’ve had a few people recommend me to Mamaka bowls and I am so glad I listened to them! The staff is so kind and seems to really care about the customers. I ordered the Mamaka bowl and it was one of the best acai bowls I have ever had! Seriously recommend!!!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Dear Madison Nodine,

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us. Please accept on behalf of myself and the entire team our sincerest apologies for the long wait time for your online order and missing our mark of serving every person with an excellent  experience.

One of our Four Pillars is speed of service and we clearly dropped the ball in both time management and delivery of your order in a timely manner.

We will use this to help our team get better and to see where we can make improvements.

We take your time seriously, and incredibly sorry for wasting some of yours.

We would like to love the opportunity to make it up to you and to personally provide a gesture of our sincerity if you would be willing to email me at:  skyla@mamakabowls.com.
reviews_data.review_text: Originally rated 5 stars because their bowls are good but their wait times are a little ridiculous for customers planning around a schedule or lunch break. It’ll tell you a 20 min wait to order ahead on the app but in my experience it’s been 40-45 minutes at minimum for a single bowl. Today I waited a full hour for it, even with the order ahead on the app. You’ve lost a customer!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Dear Luis Hernandez,
Thank you very much for reaching out and sharing your experience with us. Please accept on behalf of myself and the entire team our sincerest apologies for missing our mark of serving every person with an excellent  experience.

One of our Four Pillars is speed of service, as these bowls are made one at a time, and we clearly dropped the ball in both time management and delivery of your order in a timely manner.

We will use this to help our team get better.

We take your time seriously, and incredibly sorry for wasting some of yours.

We would like to personally provide a gesture of our sincerity if you would be willing to email me at:  skyla@mamakabowls.com
reviews_data.review_text: Great Acai bowls. However, management is understaffed. Ordered a pick up order that was supposed to be completed at 4:11pm and it was not ready until 4:45pm. Waited for over 30 minutes for something I ordered in advance so I wouldn’t have to wait.
Favorite coffee and acai in the city, staff has been amazing too!  🫶

I’ve been here twice now and it’s my new favorite smoothie bowl place! I’m pretty sure I’ve tried every smoothie bowl place in the Charlotte area and Mamaka bowls are some of the best I’ve tried. Today we had the Salted Caramel bowl - so good! Tasted like ice cream, but with clean ingredients which I really care about.

My one suggestion is to get blender covers to dampen the sound (like what Smoothie King or a lot of other smoothie shops have). It’s so loud inside the store which makes it not very enjoyable to sit inside, plus I felt bad the the workers who had difficulty hearing customers over all the blender racket. Getting some covers would really help :)

Staff were very helpful and patient with my questions, as it was my first time here.  Love the location and the fact I can walk here.  The bro smoothie was delicious and just the right balance of all ingredients.  Definitely will be back.

Sheesh could not belive the set up not set for success at all. Each fruit is cut for each bowl as they make your order with teenage kids (not great knife skills) what this means is you will be waiting for a long time for your order.

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Ryan,

I’m Skyla Spearman, the store manager at the Mamaka Charlotte location.
I’m so sorry to hear about your experience at our store today. This isn’t the level of service we strive to provide for our customers and I completely understand your frustration, we missed the mark.

I wasn’t in store at the time but I have spoken with my team and I have looked into the situation to ensure this doesn’t happen again. We would like the opportunity to correct this issue and for you to get the true Mamaka experience. Next time you come in please ask for Skyla or my assistant Julianna, so we can show you our appreciation for your business and time!
reviews_data.review_text: This is the slowest and most disrespectful service I have ever received. It took over a hour to receive one açaí bowl after ordering. For reference, today was not a busy day at all - there were a total of 8 people at the establishment during this hour wait. People who came in after me (and ordered the same thing) were served before me. I would hate to think there is a prejudice, but it’s tough to fathom another reason for it taking this long. If you’re

Great açaí bowls , the mamaka is a classic and delicious. Haven’t tried the bean but I’ve heard it’s also great. The service is good. It can get pretty loud in here because of all the blending happening but that’s expected. Good vibes but could have better seating.
Great açaí bowl place with a fun atmosphere and super cool staff. Jamie was so nice and friendly and made great recommendations.
Very nice people and delicious smoothie. Also seems to be a dollar or two cheaper than the other smoothie places nearby.
The best bowls !!!  My daughter loved it!!

There needs to be a management presence here.  Several times I’ve had significant time between 2 orders placed together (e.g., my order comes out, then orders for other people, then my wife’s order).  Today the weather was a bit cold and when I asked if the fan could be turned off I was told no, it can’t be turned off.  Additionally sometimes the bowls are watery, so consistency is not quite where it needs to be.  Often the spoons are dirty.

Easy Sunday place ,or choose the timings for yourself! Loved the Vibe and coconut infused
Coffee is great☀️🙌
The “Babe” is delicious!
Unfortunately waited 42 min for a smoothie on a Saturday at 12pm
Love this place! Used to go all the time when I lived in Arkansas and I’m so happy it’s here now!🩷

I stopped by Mamaka Bowls while walking my dogs. They are dog friendly. I got great feedback on the menu from Jamie she was very knowledgeable . I chose the namesake Mamaka Bowl. It seems all of the bowls/smoothies are or can be made vegan (Good for me). It appears they have an espresso bar too.
I look forward to trying more of their items.
Great smoothies.
So good! I went 3 days in a row lol. It taste so fresh and keeps me full for a while. :-)

I like the atmosphere and the vibes, however I waited 30 minutes for my bowl. The bowl was as good however the base wasn’t blended fully, frozen fruit chunks still not blended. Spoons down the street may be better.
Wow can’t say enough great things about this place! Such a fun place to hang and the bowls are amazing! Will def be back 😃
The Ohana literally tastes like it just fell out of a Coconut Tree
Their homemade granola is the best! And everyone is so friendly and cheerful.
Babe with Chia seeds - Delicious with the best granola ever!
I love this place..The food is amazing and the staff is fun. I want to go everyday !!!!!
best bowls i’ve ever had!!!! nicest people, cutest place and the coffee is also incredible!

Was craving an açaí bowl and Everbowl in huntersville decided to close at 7pm so this was the next option. I’m not sure what I was expecting but this just didn’t do it for me. The bowl itself wasn’t bad (i.e. toppings were fresh, decent blend of ingredients) but it felt more like a big smoothie with toppings as opposed to a bowl. I think I was expecting some type of layers and for it to be less of a soupy texture. To be fair the flavor itself was good and maybe a small bowl would’ve been the better choice but overall this was still a little disappointing. Price wise they do have Everbowl beat because 2 regular bowls were about $24, Everbowl would’ve been $30+ so there’s a win. I got the salted caramel which was kind of deceiving considering there was only salt and no caramel. There is definitely a target audience for this type of bowl but unfortunately it was not me. Great service and friendly employees, will def give this place another shot.

Tried two different smoothies, both were very good. The service was top notch. Every single employee we came into contact with was helpful and kind. One even went so far as to offer a free smoothie for our next visit after a super simple misunderstanding. The vibes inside are laid back and make you feel like you’re at the beach. They also seem to be very dog friendly as there were ~5 dogs inside during our visit. I’ll definitely be back and am looking forward to trying additional offerings.
Elite experience, wonderful management, and the best tasting bowls in the country
Excellent bowls and smoothies. They blend everything fresh, definitely the best in Charlotte.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Best review ever!!! thank you SO much and thank you so much for coming!!!!
reviews_data.review_text: Great food, friendly service. Sometimes you visit a new restaurant and they don’t have their process down yet, but they are running a tight ship. I brought my daughter with me and she wanted a chocolate milk, it wasn’t on menu but they put one together for her, thanks! We will be back.

reviews_data.review_text: Ordered pickup at 10:01am (10:20 eta) got to store at 10:16am, got my bowl at 10:52 am - crazy! And banana was beyond way too ripe.

I love the bowls here but the service is always bad in the mornings. Consistently late. In particular this morning I walked in and was not greeted at all, completely ignored as the one person behind the counter was making a bowl. Placed my pickup order 20+ minutes ago and they had not even started it. I’ve been in the store for 10minutes now so 30+ since the order was made and it’s still not being worked on. I’ve placed multiple DoorDash orders here where the driver will cancel the delivery after waiting at the store for 10s of minutes as well. Seems to be a consistent theme. Frustrating when you need to make it to work on time. Will not be ordering from here in the mornings anymore

reviews_data.owner_answer: Skye thank you so much for this review! We are sad that you missed out on some of our espresso drinks, the machine/water pressure in store have been temperamental lately and we are trying our best to get it dialed in! Already looking forward to the next time we can see you back in store :)
reviews_data.review_text: Visited on a whim and I’m glad I did! Unfortunately their espresso machine was down but Christopher suggested the drip coffee with a splash of milk and wow it’s my new favorite thing. The shop itself was very clean and workers were friendly and I absolutely felt taken care of. I will be back for a bowl!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Thank you Keith!
We appreciate your kinds words and truly strive to bring the surfer vibe to Charlotte! We appreciate you enjoying our product and thank you for being a part of Mamaka! :)
reviews_data.review_text: Best coffee I’ve ever had, and I’m quite a coffee snob. Super attentive and friendly staff as well, with a really chill “surfer vibe” atmosphere inside!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Kaitlin! We appreciate you being a loyal supporter and enjoying the Pipeline with us! Thank you for being patient with our wait times, we are working hard with each member of our team as we have a lot of new employees! We are so glad we were able to correct our mistakes and we look forward to seeing you again next week! :)
reviews_data.review_text: I order from this Mamaka probably once a week and I do agree that the wait times can be long because they cut everything to order and make it fresh so that’s why I like to order ahead of time on the app. I love the pipeline bowl and did have a small challenge with my food last time and the customer service I received from the manager was exactly as I would expect and they made everything right. Great food and great customer service I will continue to order weekly.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you London! We are so glad you enjoyed your experience and cant wait for you to be back through; we are grateful for your grace with our staff and some of the wait times, we have been working hard to improve each member of our team and have a lot of new employees who are working hard to make each product come out the best it can. Let us know what you love in your coffee and maybe we can get you pointed in an even better direction next time! Cheers :)
reviews_data.review_text: The bowls are truly made fresh and the ingredients are generous! I enjoyed the bowl more than the coffee, it did take awhile to get my order but the staff is truly working hard to make them just right, I’d definitely recommend trying mamaka next time you are in south end!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hey Owen!

Thank you for providing the feedback; we are always striving to improve and come up with creative ways to make our business better. We have on boarded a lot of new staff in recent weeks, and unfortunately dealt with a lot of spring break call outs and a wave of sickness running through the team. We were under staffed this past weekend, and are doing all that we can to get our team back up to full capacity.

We appreciate you enjoying our product, and want to strive to improve the wait time you experienced. If you could please reply directly to this review with contact information, DM us on Instagram or e-mail us hello@mamakabowls.com we would love to send you a gift card for your next couple visits on us!

Thank you!
reviews_data.review_text: Delicious but expect to wait 30+ mins every time.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the kind feedback Lindsey! we appreciate you being a loyal supporter and enjoying bowls with us! If you ever do want us to split your large bowl between 2 smaller containers or any other adjustments we are happy to try and accommodate where we can :)
reviews_data.review_text: Love love loooove mamaka! Some of my favorite açaí! My only feesback is the large bowls are deep and hard to mix everything together so you get a little bit of everything in each bite, but being nit picky. It’s super yummy and they have great bowl recipes.
The bean es el mejor bowl 😍
This place is the best coffee and smoothie place in the state! Soooo yummy and such awesome staff!
Employees are so kind and make the best açaí bowls ever!
Love this place so much. It never disappoints
Love a good bowl from Mamaka!   The bro is one of my favorites to always order! The gnarly coffee is always a bonus to get. Must try if in the Charlotte area!
Great vibes, great açaí!
Most delicious thing I’ve ever eaten had the peanut butter bowl

Met Blake at Mamakas in Houston TX. He invited us to visit Mamakas in Charlotte. We did and we were not disappointed. Great experience, great service. Neat shop. Enjoyed the experience. Will return soon!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the kind words Christine! Allergies are always taken seriously around here:) we appreciate you being a part of Mamaka!
reviews_data.review_text: They take allergies seriously and prep food in a different space!

Visiting NC, i wanted a smoothie bowl. I’m so glad I chose Mamaka Bowls! The atmosphere was great when I walked in. Everyone was very nice. The man who took my order was SO NICE. They made a slight mistake and he came out to the car to bring me the right drink and told me to keep the old one. My bowl and drinks were so refreshing and delicious. 10/10. so good.

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Bailyn!

Thank you for taking the time to reply; we absolutely hear you and want you to know, in full transparency this is something we are working diligently to rectify on our end. Unfortunately with winter holidays, and turnover with staff in between school semesters we frankly have been under staffed. We have brought on new leadership staff, and ensuring that our customer wait times are brought down is one of our top priorities.

Regardless of staffing, it is completely unacceptable for the cash register to ever be left unattended; even if we are having to run with only our manager, or 1-2 team members, there should always be someone stationed there to ensure guests are able to get their order in.

Thank you again for taking the time to provide us this feedback; we know that we have ground to gain in this area, and we will continue doing all we can in order to accomplish that end. We really appreciate you being a repeat customer at Mamaka and continuing to give us a chance.

If you could please DM us on Instagram @mamakabowls, reply directly to this comment, or email us at hello@mamakabowls.com we would love to send you a gift card for your next visit on us, and allow us to continue to grow.

Thank you!
reviews_data.review_text: I like this place but every time I come, the service is just so slow! I feel like there should be someone available to take orders at all times. There is never a time where there should be an empty cash register. There is absolutely zero urgency and it’s unfortunate because the product is quality. The vibes are just a little too chill. Like is anyone taking a job seriously…

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Stormy, we’re so sorry to hear about your experience trying to reach us. We weren’t aware there was an issue with our phone line, and we truly apologize for the frustration this caused. Our team is looking into this right now with customer support, as we are not receiving our calls. We’d still love the chance to connect with you, please reach out to us at blake@mamakabowls.com so we can assist you right away!

We also have online services (order.mamakabowls.com) as well as an app (mamaka) that gets your requests directly to us. We created these avenues to make things simpler and make sure you always get a response as quick as possible. Again, we apologize about our technical difficulties.
reviews_data.review_text:
EDIT*: I had placed a 1 star review, but the service and dedication to fix the issue has been quick. I also like their product despite inconsistencies, so I recommend going for both their coffees and bowls and reaching out if you have any issues!!

Another edit: the manager only offered to fix the situation if I’d come in and have a chat with him. Very uncomfortable.

I have been coming to this place for about 3 months now and I like the bowls. However I have a problem with the guy in the glasses. I had ordered a coffee and got the worst latte that I had ever tasted in my life. I had a conversation with him while waiting for my order and I felt very offended by the things he was saying to me. Nothing but rude and very uncomfortable. Do not recommend coming in for a coffee at all. Never coming here again after this experience.

Great service,  I placed an online order and got stuck in traffic so I called them and the manager told me not to worry. He said he would gauge it when I was a few minutes away so that it was fresh and that I was happy. Definitely made my day. The manager went above and beyond. Will be coming back for sure!

I've been coming to this place for more than a couple of months, the girls always provide excellent service, but today I ran into a guy with glasses who made a somewhat derogatory comment towards me. I don't know why this happens in 2025. This person ruined the whole good impression I had of the entire team in just 2 minutes.
Super delicious smoothie bowls and it’s a really cute place!
Great spot for acai bowls and smoothies! 10/10

This place has officially won my heart when it comes to smoothie and acai bowls! I have tried them from quite a few places and never had one that immediately made me go, OH Wow! The flavor was crafted to perfection 👌 plus like how some places do they'll leave an off putting aftertaste but not this place! I would've eaten it all in one sitting if I could and let's not mention the SIZE for the PRICE ❤️ Yall are out here doing God's work! Continued blessings on your business and may you continue reaching your target audience, I am definitely one of them 🫶🏼😌

5.0 more like 6.0 ! If you like fresh, this is the place. They have a handful of locations but that doesn’t stop them from being the best in town! Got the opportunity to work with them on some collaborations and the ladies were so much fun to hangout with. Can’t say enough good about this company. Go go go!
I thoroughly enjoyed my pumpkin bowl. There was no time to take a picture because it looked too good and it tasted as good as it looked. I’ll get a picture when I go back.
Smoothies are great but they played the most depressing music

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Andy! Thank you for taking the time to share this feedback with us; our goal is to always provide a great customer experience, and part of how we strive to accomplish that is our speed of service.

During our peak times lines can definitely get crazy, and we apologize that your wait was longer than anticipated. We do have an app for mobile orders, we offer online ordering and if you ever want to just call in, we will take your call ahead orders over the phone too!

As you experienced, everything we make is fresh to order. It is one of the things we pride ourselves on, no preservatives, no added sugars, what you see on our menu is exactly what you get. Our team is trained to keep a clean prep station, rotate their utensils, and cleanliness is something we stress heavily. However, when the bowls are lined up down the counter and we are trying to get as many bowls made as possible, they may have had some left over fruit pieces in between that they cleaned after the fact. We absolutely understand that sometimes that can increase wait times, but we’d love to have you back in store to give the product another chance, on us!

If you could comment below or DM our instagram, we’d love to send you a free bowl for next time. Thank you so much!
reviews_data.review_text:
20 mins to order plus 25 mins to get food is way too long for an açaí bowl, especially waiting inside a place with multiple blenders going on. Just horrible.

Staffs looked busy, but simply running like headless chickens. You prep your strawberries beforehand, not cutting on the spot and toss leftover on the floor. Having trash all over the line is simply a lack of training and experience.

Do not recommend.
Super fresh and tasty smoothies and fruit bowls. Love their coconut coffee too.

I want to keep coming to this place but the quality goes down hill each time I come. Bowl base to topping ratios are off. Needs more toppings, otherwise you end up eating a bowl of plain base for most of the bowl (even the smallest size). I appreciate their attention to allergy details. I feel like it’s because their staff is in a hurry to get bowls out, which I understand but hate that quality of all things is what is sacrificed. These bowls can be expensive so hoping they can improve their operations to maintain consistency.

The smoothie bowls here are SO good! The fruit blend is so smooth and creamy and the granola and other toppings were fresh and delicious. The breakfast tacos were disappointing so I would skip those next time, but the coffee was another item I’d get again. The shop is very cute, but the floors looked dirty and the stools they have at the tables were very rickety and uncomfortable. Overall, a good experience with the bowls, coffee, and staff!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hey Sophie! Thank you for your honest and thoughtful feedback. We’re genuinely sorry to hear about your recent experience — that’s not the level of service we strive to provide, and we completely understand your frustration.
We’ve gone ahead and refunded your order, and we deeply regret the delay and confusion with your order. While we’re proud of the quality of our bowls and coffee, experiences like yours show us where we need to grow. We’re actively reviewing our order flow and have already addressed this issue with our team to help prevent anything like it from happening again.

Customer care and consistency are top priorities for us, and we're committed to holding ourselves to a higher standard. We'd truly appreciate the opportunity to make this right — please feel free to send us a direct message or email to emma@mamakabowls.com so your next visit is on us! We'd love to welcome you back and ensure your next visit reflects the experience you should always have at Mamaka.

Thank you again for taking the time to share your experience.
reviews_data.review_text:
Great bowls and coffee, but disappointing service. I really enjoy Mamaka’s bowls and coffee. The quality of the food and drinks is consistently good. However, my experiences with the service have not matched that same standard.

Most times I’ve been in, the staff isn’t particularly friendly or accommodating, and the service can be quite slow. I understand that bowls and smoothies can be time consuming to make, especially when the shop is busy, but even during slower times, I’ve noticed a lack of urgency and customer care.

My most recent visit was especially frustrating. We went in about 15 minutes after opening. There were only two other customers who had already ordered. We got a drip coffee, a specialty latte, and one small bowl to share. The coffees came out quickly, but the bowl never arrived. After waiting 30 minutes, we finally went to check and it seems that our order had been lost.

From what I could tell, the ordering system involves writing orders directly on the cups and bowls, which means if someone forgets to do that step, the order simply vanishes. That’s exactly what happened. It seems our bowl was never written down, so it was never made. It took another 15 minutes after we asked for them to prepare it.

What was meant to be a quick stop turned into an hour-long wait, and there was no real apology or accountability from the staff. The lack of ownership over the mistake and the generally dismissive attitude made it clear that customer experience isn’t a priority.

I want to keep supporting Mamaka because their offerings are great, but I hope they seriously reevaluate how they treat their customers and consider implementing a more reliable ordering system.

UPDATE:
Since posting my original review, the team at Mamaka responded to make things right. I’ve since returned, and I’m happy to say the experience was much better. The staff were friendly, the service was quick, and my bowl was just as yummy as I remember. I very much appreciate that they took the time to address my concerns. It really shows they care about their customers and are willing to improve. I’m looking forward to my next visit!
The bowls are absolutely delicious. They also have many health add ons that can be added/customized to your bowl

What a fun place! I love the swing they have hanging in the doorway (when it’s nice out) the decor is beachy/summer/surfing. The bowls are some of the best outside of ones I have had in Hawaii! It’s such a nice treat to have on a walk, on a sunny day, or anytime you need a a fresh pick me up.

Beautiful atmosphere with bright colors and a super friendly vibe. The staff was welcoming, and the menu is simple and easy to follow. There’s plenty of comfortable seating, and they had the windows open, so fresh air and a nice breeze made it even better.

They even have a swing you can sit on — such a fun touch! I sat at one of the indoor tables and waited less than 4 minutes for my order. I got the Pipeline Smoothie, which was delicious. Next time, I’m definitely trying one of their bowls!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hey Alex! Thank you for taking the time to write this review, we are super sorry that you experienced a longer wait time in store today, and the team felt understaffed. Staffing on holiday weekends can be challenging and we are always working hard to balance that demand between guests, and our team.

We are working on this diligently right now as a corporate team to get more quality team members on board and be able to better balance the load. Along with the holiday weekend, we are in the middle of a big summer transition as much of our staff leaves/comes back for college.

If you would comment back to this reply, or DM us directly on Instagram, we would love to have you back in store with your next visit on us! Speed of Service and Attentive and Courteous Service are two of our operational pillars, and as we keep working to get Charlotte fully up to speed we are confident you can experience both during each visit.

Thank you!
reviews_data.review_text: The product is great. But the staff is overworked. They need more employees here. 30+ min wait time for a smoothie is laughable.
Great customer service and menu has a lot of options.
I always enjoy getting a Mamaka bowl made to order. The employees work as fast as they can to serve you and always kind.
Was road tripping and saw that this was in the vicinity.  I love this place in DFW !

I fell in love last year and I have stayed loyal since. I've been tempted by other smoothie places through door dash coupons, bogo deals and friends trying to set me up but ive never cheated. The staff here are always dancing and having fun. It's highly infectious until I see the reflection in the glare of the window and realize... I have no rhythm. The interior makes me feel like im a surfer in Hawaii. However, once I get out of the store i remind myself.... i almost drowned in a 3ft pool. I was stuck on the bro for a year but ive finally moved onto the bean in 2025. May take me 11 more years to try the rest of the menu.
Very good fresh smoothie bowls with a chill beach vibe.
so so delicious!! fresh (not frozen) fruit, creamy smoothie base, homemade granola, and well packaged!
love it! sooo good so hard to find a good place and this was delish amazing quality the place itself is stunning
Bro bowl :) add honey on top !

I was quite excited when I saw a Mamaka location in charlotte while looking for some breakfast. I’d only been to the original location in Fayetteville AR which is GREAT. I was highly disappointed with this one, I went at 9am and was told they are out of the breakfast taco on the menu. I felt rushed to order and the vibes were just not the same as the other location. Possibly understaffed which could explain the rude check out girl she may have just been stressed or new but never the less I was very disappointed due to expecting it to be like the Fayetteville location.
This is the cutest little spot with the best bowls and coffee!! I love the Bean bowl and the iced gnarley 😋😋
Super friendly staff, amazing atmosphere and most importantly delicious smoothie bowls! Super fast and attentive workers! Will definitely be back!

I’ve had a few people recommend me to Mamaka bowls and I am so glad I listened to them! The staff is so kind and seems to really care about the customers. I ordered the Mamaka bowl and it was one of the best acai bowls I have ever had! Seriously recommend!!!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Dear Madison Nodine,

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us. Please accept on behalf of myself and the entire team our sincerest apologies for the long wait time for your online order and missing our mark of serving every person with an excellent  experience.

One of our Four Pillars is speed of service and we clearly dropped the ball in both time management and delivery of your order in a timely manner.

We will use this to help our team get better and to see where we can make improvements.

We take your time seriously, and incredibly sorry for wasting some of yours.

We would like to love the opportunity to make it up to you and to personally provide a gesture of our sincerity if you would be willing to email me at:  skyla@mamakabowls.com.
reviews_data.review_text: Originally rated 5 stars because their bowls are good but their wait times are a little ridiculous for customers planning around a schedule or lunch break. It’ll tell you a 20 min wait to order ahead on the app but in my experience it’s been 40-45 minutes at minimum for a single bowl. Today I waited a full hour for it, even with the order ahead on the app. You’ve lost a customer!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Dear Luis Hernandez,
Thank you very much for reaching out and sharing your experience with us. Please accept on behalf of myself and the entire team our sincerest apologies for missing our mark of serving every person with an excellent  experience.

One of our Four Pillars is speed of service, as these bowls are made one at a time, and we clearly dropped the ball in both time management and delivery of your order in a timely manner.

We will use this to help our team get better.

We take your time seriously, and incredibly sorry for wasting some of yours.

We would like to personally provide a gesture of our sincerity if you would be willing to email me at:  skyla@mamakabowls.com
reviews_data.review_text: Great Acai bowls. However, management is understaffed. Ordered a pick up order that was supposed to be completed at 4:11pm and it was not ready until 4:45pm. Waited for over 30 minutes for something I ordered in advance so I wouldn’t have to wait.
Favorite coffee and acai in the city, staff has been amazing too!  🫶

I’ve been here twice now and it’s my new favorite smoothie bowl place! I’m pretty sure I’ve tried every smoothie bowl place in the Charlotte area and Mamaka bowls are some of the best I’ve tried. Today we had the Salted Caramel bowl - so good! Tasted like ice cream, but with clean ingredients which I really care about.

My one suggestion is to get blender covers to dampen the sound (like what Smoothie King or a lot of other smoothie shops have). It’s so loud inside the store which makes it not very enjoyable to sit inside, plus I felt bad the the workers who had difficulty hearing customers over all the blender racket. Getting some covers would really help :)

Staff were very helpful and patient with my questions, as it was my first time here.  Love the location and the fact I can walk here.  The bro smoothie was delicious and just the right balance of all ingredients.  Definitely will be back.

Sheesh could not belive the set up not set for success at all. Each fruit is cut for each bowl as they make your order with teenage kids (not great knife skills) what this means is you will be waiting for a long time for your order.

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Ryan,

I’m Skyla Spearman, the store manager at the Mamaka Charlotte location.
I’m so sorry to hear about your experience at our store today. This isn’t the level of service we strive to provide for our customers and I completely understand your frustration, we missed the mark.

I wasn’t in store at the time but I have spoken with my team and I have looked into the situation to ensure this doesn’t happen again. We would like the opportunity to correct this issue and for you to get the true Mamaka experience. Next time you come in please ask for Skyla or my assistant Julianna, so we can show you our appreciation for your business and time!
reviews_data.review_text: This is the slowest and most disrespectful service I have ever received. It took over a hour to receive one açaí bowl after ordering. For reference, today was not a busy day at all - there were a total of 8 people at the establishment during this hour wait. People who came in after me (and ordered the same thing) were served before me. I would hate to think there is a prejudice, but it’s tough to fathom another reason for it taking this long. If you’re

Great açaí bowls , the mamaka is a classic and delicious. Haven’t tried the bean but I’ve heard it’s also great. The service is good. It can get pretty loud in here because of all the blending happening but that’s expected. Good vibes but could have better seating.
Great açaí bowl place with a fun atmosphere and super cool staff. Jamie was so nice and friendly and made great recommendations.
Very nice people and delicious smoothie. Also seems to be a dollar or two cheaper than the other smoothie places nearby.
The best bowls !!!  My daughter loved it!!

There needs to be a management presence here.  Several times I’ve had significant time between 2 orders placed together (e.g., my order comes out, then orders for other people, then my wife’s order).  Today the weather was a bit cold and when I asked if the fan could be turned off I was told no, it can’t be turned off.  Additionally sometimes the bowls are watery, so consistency is not quite where it needs to be.  Often the spoons are dirty.

Easy Sunday place ,or choose the timings for yourself! Loved the Vibe and coconut infused
Coffee is great☀️🙌
The “Babe” is delicious!
Unfortunately waited 42 min for a smoothie on a Saturday at 12pm
Love this place! Used to go all the time when I lived in Arkansas and I’m so happy it’s here now!🩷

I stopped by Mamaka Bowls while walking my dogs. They are dog friendly. I got great feedback on the menu from Jamie she was very knowledgeable . I chose the namesake Mamaka Bowl. It seems all of the bowls/smoothies are or can be made vegan (Good for me). It appears they have an espresso bar too.
I look forward to trying more of their items.
Great smoothies.
So good! I went 3 days in a row lol. It taste so fresh and keeps me full for a while. :-)

I like the atmosphere and the vibes, however I waited 30 minutes for my bowl. The bowl was as good however the base wasn’t blended fully, frozen fruit chunks still not blended. Spoons down the street may be better.
Wow can’t say enough great things about this place! Such a fun place to hang and the bowls are amazing! Will def be back 😃
The Ohana literally tastes like it just fell out of a Coconut Tree
Their homemade granola is the best! And everyone is so friendly and cheerful.
Babe with Chia seeds - Delicious with the best granola ever!
I love this place..The food is amazing and the staff is fun. I want to go everyday !!!!!
best bowls i’ve ever had!!!! nicest people, cutest place and the coffee is also incredible!

Was craving an açaí bowl and Everbowl in huntersville decided to close at 7pm so this was the next option. I’m not sure what I was expecting but this just didn’t do it for me. The bowl itself wasn’t bad (i.e. toppings were fresh, decent blend of ingredients) but it felt more like a big smoothie with toppings as opposed to a bowl. I think I was expecting some type of layers and for it to be less of a soupy texture. To be fair the flavor itself was good and maybe a small bowl would’ve been the better choice but overall this was still a little disappointing. Price wise they do have Everbowl beat because 2 regular bowls were about $24, Everbowl would’ve been $30+ so there’s a win. I got the salted caramel which was kind of deceiving considering there was only salt and no caramel. There is definitely a target audience for this type of bowl but unfortunately it was not me. Great service and friendly employees, will def give this place another shot.

Tried two different smoothies, both were very good. The service was top notch. Every single employee we came into contact with was helpful and kind. One even went so far as to offer a free smoothie for our next visit after a super simple misunderstanding. The vibes inside are laid back and make you feel like you’re at the beach. They also seem to be very dog friendly as there were ~5 dogs inside during our visit. I’ll definitely be back and am looking forward to trying additional offerings.
Elite experience, wonderful management, and the best tasting bowls in the country
Excellent bowls and smoothies. They blend everything fresh, definitely the best in Charlotte.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Best review ever!!! thank you SO much and thank you so much for coming!!!!
reviews_data.review_text: Great food, friendly service. Sometimes you visit a new restaurant and they don’t have their process down yet, but they are running a tight ship. I brought my daughter with me and she wanted a chocolate milk, it wasn’t on menu but they put one together for her, thanks! We will be back.
